scripts.build: npm run verify:no-raw-fetch && npm --prefix client-app run build
scripts.test: npm run verify:no-raw-fetch && npm --prefix client-app run test
scripts.test:e2e: bash -lc 'set -a; source .env.test; set +a; npm run dev >/tmp/bf-e2e-dev.log 2>&1 & DEV_PID=$!; trap "kill $DEV_PID" EXIT; sleep 5; npm --prefix client-app exec vitest run src/e2e/applicationFlow.test.ts'
